title: silly shaders
body:
# **Epilespy warning**


Q: **What is this ?**                                                                             
A: This Shaderpack randomly moves the vertices of every block/entity/anything else every frame in order to create absolute chaos on your screen

Q: [**<ins>Isn't that just a worse version of danilwhale's sillyrendering mod ?</ins>** ](https://modrinth.com/mod/sillyrendering)                          
A: Yes it absolutely is, but this Shaderpack only requires Iris / Optifine and it's also probably compatible with your favorite performance and content mods

Q: **Why did you make this ?**                                                                        
A: Why not ? (+ It made me learn the basics of programming Shaderpacks)
